title: crotalaria dewildemaniana subsp. oxyrhyncha
intro: Crotalaria dewildemaniana subsp. oxyrhyncha, also known as Oxyrhynchus velvet pod or velvet pod, is a plant species in the legume family native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria dewildemaniana subsp. oxyrhyncha include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
